scripts.lint: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process'),fs=require('fs');let n=0,bad=0;for(const d of['js','tests']){for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d)){if(!f.endsWith('.js'))continue;n++;try{execSync('node --check '+d+'/'+f)}catch(e){bad++;console.error('\u2717 '+d+'/'+f+'\n'+String(e.stderr||e.message))}}}console.log(bad?bad+' of '+n+' file(s) failed':'\u2713 '+n+' js files OK');process.exit(bad?1:0)"
